sendModal.title: Send document
sendModal.noTemplatesFound: No templates found for this document type.

summary.heading: Document summary
summary.fallbackDescription: Review the key terms below before sending or accepting this document.
summary.finePrint: This summary clarifies the key dates, fees, conditions, and scholarship details attached to the document.

editor.nameRequired: Enter a document name before saving.
editor.saveRequiresName: Add a document name first, then save again.
editor.templateNameHelp: Name the template so it is easy to find in your documents list and ready to save.
editor.documentNameHelp: Name the document so it is easy to find later in the profile and documents list.

celebration.offerDescription: Your personalized offer is ready. Open it to review the full details and make a decision.
celebration.scholarshipDescription: Your personalized scholarship is ready. Open it to review the full details and make a decision.

decisionPanel.title: Decision
decisionPanel.description: Choose one action. Postpone is limited to a single 3/7/14 day decision window.

studentOffers.emptyDescription: When a university sends you an offer or scholarship, it will appear here.

studentDocument.closedForFurtherActions: This document is closed for further actions.

universityDocuments.selectDocumentToInspect: Select any sent document to inspect its snapshot and audit trail.
universityDocuments.moduleDecisionsText: Unified documents engine, one editor for offer/scholarship, single postpone flow, snapshot storage, expired distinct from declined.
universityDocuments.settingsFootnote: Deleting a template does not affect already sent documents because every student document stores its own frozen snapshot and rendered payload.
